Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Allen Matkins
Off Calendar Apr-07-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM W. HUCKINS OF ALLEN MATKINS, TEL. NO. 1-415-273-7426 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ADRIAN J. SAWYER & ATTY. DAVIEL J. VEROFF OF KERR & WAGSTAFFE, TEL. NO. 1-415-371-8500 APPEARING THE NON-PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Non-parties Sunil Suri, Karan Suri, and Akhil Suri's motion to disqualify the Allen Matkins law firm is denied. Assuming without deciding that an attorney-client relationship existed between Allen Matkins and the Suris, there is no substantial relationship between Allen Matkins' current representation of plaintiff L.E.K. Consulting LLC and its former representation of the Suris and Hawkins Way, LLC and Allen Matkins did not receive confidential information in the prior representation that is material to the current representation. The two representations are factually and legally distinct. Allen Matkins' representation of the Suris and Hawkins Way LLC involved the potential acquisition of hotel property. The representation of LEK involves the enforcement of a sister-state judgment and involves defendant Menlo Capital Group, LLC's current and former assets. The legal questions posed by the former representation arose out of a due diligence undertaking and involved land-use regulations, zoning and tenant relocation issues. The current representation involves lien attachment and levies, asset identification, and conversion of identified assets into money to satisfy the judgment. Moreover, the nature and extent of Allen Matkins' involvement with the former representation was limited to around 21 hours of work reviewing land-use regulations, reviewing a proposed tie-back agreement, preparing a due diligence memorandum, and advising on tenant relocation obligations for SRO hotels. Given the material differences in the two representations and the short duration of the prior representation, the court credits the declaration of Jeffrey Chine that no confidential information material to the current representation was disclosed in the former representation. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780 =302/hk
